_readme: SEED INSTRUCTIONS — delete this entire object before running the seed!
step1: Seed the departments first using departments.seed.json into your departments table.
step2: Once departments are seeded, replace dept_code values in this file with the actual dept_id UUIDs from your DB.
step3: Seed this file into your subjects table and you're done!

how_to_get_dept_ids.lazy_but_smart_way: After seeding departments, export the table as .json from NeonDB (click the 3-dots in the top-right of the table preview header). Then hand that exported .json + this file to Claude/any AI and ask it to generate an updated SQL INSERT query with the correct dept_id values mapped. Run that query in NeonDB's SQL Editor. Done. 100% works — verified! 🚀
how_to_get_dept_ids.programmatic_way: Write a seed script that first fetches all departments, builds a dept_code → dept_id map, then inserts each subject by resolving dept_id from dept_code at runtime.
how_to_get_dept_ids.manual_way: Replace each dept_code value with the actual UUID from your departments table one by one. Painful but valid. Your choice! 😏

note: dept_code is used as a placeholder here instead of dept_id since UUIDs are environment-specific and will differ across local, staging, and production databases.
